message:
refactor(fcp-bootstrap): Improve error handling and code organization

Systematic improvements across bootstrap ceremony modules:

- ceremony.rs: Restructure validation flow, improve error messages
- cold_recovery.rs: Simplify recovery state transitions
- genesis.rs: Add documentation comment
- hardware_token.rs: Add must_use annotation
- time_validation.rs: Clarify time bounds checking
- workflow.rs: Improve step orchestration and error propagation

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
